name: Cooling Jars
recipeInstructions:
1. Do not retighten jar lids after removing hot jars from a canner.
2. Retightening may damage the gasket and cause seal failures.
3. Cool jars at room temperature for 12 to 24 hours on racks or towels.
4. Raw-packed jars will have lower food levels and liquid volume after cooling due to air exhaustion and shrinkage during processing.
5. If a jar loses excessive liquid, do not open it to add more liquid.
6. Check lids for seals.
